caption: A person's hands are shown opening a box of Topps "CLEARLY AUTHENTIC 2020" sports cards. The box sits on a green surface, and multiple other identical boxes are stacked in the background. Throughout the sequence, the person handles the packaging, removing a clear plastic wrapper. The scene is framed with a graphic overlay featuring the "JASPYS CASEBREAKS" logo in orange and white, accompanied by the URL "CASEBREAKS.com". In the bottom right corner, a small inset video shows a man wearing a black t-shirt with red text, watching the process. As the action progresses, the hands pull the plastic away from the box and shift the box's position. The background remains a consistent indoor setting with a white wall and a red and white object partially visible on the left side of the table.
